title: Telegram webhook not receiving messages due to timeout
symptom: The Telegram Trigger in n8n shows 'Waiting for trigger events' and Telegram's `getWebhookInfo` indicates a 'Read timeout expired'.
not_this_if: Webhook is functioning on a different domain
root_cause: Telegram may have blacklisted the hosting provider's URLs, preventing it from reaching the n8n instance. This can occur if the hosting provider has a poor reputation or has been flagged for abuse.
fix_steps: Change the webhook URL to a different domain that is not blacklisted
Update the Telegram bot settings with the new webhook URL
Test the webhook to ensure it is receiving messages
agent_instruction: Switch to a new domain for the Telegram webhook and update the settings accordingly.
